creator: tuexen@freebsd.org
text:
Thank you very much for testing! I think the bug reported (the panic) is fixed.

Regarding the performance: I would suggest that you open a new bug regarding unexpected performance results on the BBR stack. Please note that the BBR stack is experimental and has not been tested in a VM environment.

Right now I have no idea if the is a problem in the BBR stack or in the hyperv driver, but I would like to get some insights... I'm also not sure what the difference is between the measurement in comment #39 and comment #40.
